data.title: Mike Dunleavy appointed as CEO of Van Metre Companies to lead long-term growth. Company with 70-year history of success.
data.description: Van Metre Companies, a privately held real estate development, construction, and investment firm, based in Fairfax, Virginia, has recently announced a leadership transition on January 28, 2026. With a history spanning over 70 years, the company has a strong foundation of success. The transition aims to solidify the company's position for long-term growth. This change comes as part of strategic planning to continue the legacy of excellence.

data.title: Tech Alpharetta rebrands to "Tech North Atlanta," expanding footprint to serve the tech community. (Characters: 92)
data.description: Alpharetta, GA - Tech Alpharetta, a nonprofit organization supporting innovation in Alpharetta since 2012, revealed a new name and logo on January 28, 2026. The rebranding signifies an expanded reach to cater to the North Atlanta tech community. This development marks a significant milestone in the organization's evolution, as it continues its mission to foster tech growth. Tech Alpharetta has been a pivotal player in propelling the city to the forefront of innovation, and the new branding is a testament to its commitment to furthering this cause.

data.title: 2026 Building Industry Show in California accepts exhibitors for leading homebuilding event with rock concert, education sessions, and awards gala.
data.description: The annual marquee event hosted by the Building Industry Association of Southern California is set to take place in Irvine, California on January 28, 2026. The event will showcase a legendary rock concert experience along with educational sessions, networking opportunities, and an awards gala. This highly anticipated event is expected to draw a large attendance and offer a variety of engaging activities for participants.

data.title: Malaysia defense industry to receive $4.8B in 2025, 6.0% CAGR growth expected through 2030 - Report.
data.description: Recently, a report on the Malaysia Defense Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report outlines the market size and trends, budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, competitive landscape, and forecasts for the period 2025-2030. It includes insights into the projected growth rate over the next five years and covers industry analysis highlighting market drivers, emerging technology trends, and major challenges encountered by market players. The report aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the Malaysia Defense Market, assisting stakeholders in making informed decisions.

data.title: Branding dispute leads to crypto scam; CLAWD coin briefly hits $16 million, causing 24-hour chaos.
data.description: Fraudsters took advantage of a short window during a trademark conflict to introduce the meme currency CLAWD, pumping its value up to $16 million before their scheme was exposed. This incident transformed a popular AI initiative into a case study on online scams.
